generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

network.title: Connection Error
network.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

unauthorized.title: Session Expired
unauthorized.message: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.message: You don't have permission to access this resource.

validation.title: Validation Error
validation.message: Please check the form and correct any errors.

rateLimit.title: Too Many Requests
rateLimit.message: Please slow down. Try again in a few moments.

server.title: Server Error
server.message: Our servers are having issues. Please try again later.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.message: We're currently performing maintenance. Please check back soon.

api.AUTHORIZATION_ERROR: You don't have permission for this action
api.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found
api.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again
api.CONFLICT: This action conflicts with existing data
api.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
